CustomObject.description: Lookup table mapping canonical permit label strings (as they appear in NEPA_Permit_Matrix__mdt Required_Permits__c) to structured RegulatoryAuthorizationType field values. Used by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator to create nepa_required_permit__c child records with accurate agency, citation, critical-path flag, and SLA data. One record per distinct federal permit or authorization type.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Permit Type Catalog
